titleStmt.title: SII 16.71: original edition by H. K. Narasimhaswami and G. S. Gai
No. 71. (A.R. No. 412 of 1919.) LITTLE KĀÑCHĪPURAM, KANCHIPURAM TALUK, CHINGLEPUT DISTRICT.

summary.p: On the south side of the rock in the Āruḷāḷperumāḷ temple.
This record in a single line, is dated Śaka 1443, Vṛisha, Bhādrapada śu. 13, Friday, Śravaṇa, corresponding to 1521 A.D., August 16.

It registers the gift of five silver vessels at a cost of 300 māḍas and an endowment of 300 māḍas for certain offerings to god Varadarāju by Rāyasam Śrīpataya. Nārayya, the adhikāri of Śrīpataya had the provisions of the endowment executed.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p: śubhamastu . svastiśrī vijayābdudeya sālivāhana śakavaruśālu . 1443 Agunēṭi vriṣa saṁvatsarada bhādrapada śudha 13 śukravāra śravaṇa nakṣatrānanu śrīmaNmahārājā dhirāja rājaparamēśvara muvarāyara(ra)gaṁḍa Ariyarāyavibhāḍa Aṣṭadikurāyamanō bhayaṁkara pūrvadakṣiṇapaścimasamudrādhīśvara bhāśegetappuvarāyaragaṁḍa yevanarājya stāpanācāryya gajapativibhāḍa śrīvīrapratāpa śrīvīra kruṣṇadēvamahārāyala rāyasaṁ śrīpataya poli[Uṭu] Ubhayaṁgānu dadhyōdanānakuṁnu tiruvattisāmamu Āragiṁce Aṁduku veṁḍitaḷigelu nāluguṁnu Abhiṣēkānaku ttirumaṁjanamu tecēAṁduku veṁḍibiṁdya vogaṭiṁni yi Ayiduṁnu muṁnūṟu māḷaku sēyiṁci varadarājadēvaraku samarppiṁci yī muṁnūṟu māḷakuṁnu pōli[Uṭu] U bhayaṁgā gaṭi dinamōgaṁṭiki 8 taḷigelu Āragiṁcē Aṭuvalana kaṭaḷa sēstini yiṁduku tirupariyāraṁ sēsēvāriki pātrasēṣānaku na 6 lu nāluguvagavāriki 5 na 2 lu voyi viṭṭavanuviḷukāḍu reṁḍu taḷigelu samarpiṁcukōgalavāramu yani Ācaṁdrārka stāyigānu naḍavagaladi yeni varadarājadēvaraku samarppiṁstimi . śrīpatayagāri Adhikāri nārayyagāru pōliUṭu kaṭaḍa sēyiṁcenu .
Digital edition of SII 16.71 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
